name: Mock Kishke
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces crackers, Wheat Tams are good
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the crackers and veggies together using a food processor.
2. Mix the ground ingredients with the margarine, salt, pepper, and egg until well combined.
3. Form the mixture into long cylinders and place on foil sheets.
4. Wrap each cylinder completely in foil.
5. Arrange the wrapped cylinders on a baking pan, preferably jelly roll size.
6. Bake for about 40 minutes at 350°F.
Note: Turn off the oven when the desired browning is achieved. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
